title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A step-by-step tutorial on using Claude Code with Ollama to build agentic AI applications locally without paid APIs. The guide covers installation, setup, LLM selection, and building a complete travel agency AI app with Flask UI.
